mapper.insert: INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_2#Sql002_1 */ INTO T_IPO_PO_ORDER ( PRODUCT_CODE, PRESENTATION_FROM, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, BROKER_CODE, INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD, DEALER_NUMBER, LOTTERY_RESULT, QUANTITY_ALLOC, ORDER_PRICE, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER, SYS_ID ) VALUES( #{req.brandCode}, #{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}, #{req.butenCode}, #{req.accountNumber}, #{req.brokerCode}, #{req.brokerChargeCode}, #{req.dealerNumber}, #{req.lotteryResult}, #{req.bbQuantityAlloc}, null, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId}, 'SUB0204_02-04_2' )

INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_2#Sql002_2 */ INTO T_IPO_PO_ORDER_DETAIL ( PRODUCT_CODE, PRESENTATION_FROM, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, DETAIL_NUMBER, ORDER_STATUS, ORDER_USER, ORDER_TIME, ORDER_COUNT, APPOINT_PRICE, DEPOSIT_TYPE, INVITATION_TYPE, ORDER_METHOD, PROSPECTUS, EXPLANATION_INFO, WARNING_APPLY, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER, SYS_ID ) VALUES( #{req.brandCode}, #{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}, #{req.butenCode}, #{req.accountNumber}, '001', #{req.orderStatus}, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId}, 'SUB0204_02-04_2' )
mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_2#Sql005 */ NAME FROM M_CODE WHERE CODE_TYPE = '38' AND CODE_1 = '01' AND CODE_2 = 'END_TIME'
mapper.insert: INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_2#Sql006_2 */ INTO T_IPO_PO_ORDER_DETAIL ( PRODUCT_CODE, PRESENTATION_FROM, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, DETAIL_NUMBER, ORDER_STATUS, ORDER_USER, ORDER_TIME, ORDER_COUNT, APPOINT_PRICE, DEPOSIT_TYPE, INVITATION_TYPE, ORDER_METHOD, PROSPECTUS, EXPLANATION_INFO, WARNING_APPLY, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER, SYS_ID ) VALUES( #{req.brandCode}, #{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}, #{req.butenCode}, #{req.accountNumber}, LPAD(#{req.detailNumber} + 1,3,'0'), '0', null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId}, 'SUB0204_02-04_2' )
mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_2#Sql007 */ UAI_SPECIFIC_KBN AS TOKUTEI_KOUZA_KBN, UAI_ISA_CONTRACT_KBN AS ISA_CONTRACT_TYPE, UAI_ISA_BUY_CURRENT_YEAR_KBN as ISA_BUY_ABLE_JUDGE_CLASSIFICATION_YEAR, CUSTOMER_ID AS CUSTOMER_ID FROM CORDYS.MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = TO_NUMBER(#{req.customerCode})

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_2#Sql008 */ COUNT(*) AS ROW_COUNT FROM CALLCENTER.ATTENTION_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = TO_NUMBER(#{req.customerCode}) AND ON_OFF_FLG = '有効' AND DELETE_TIME IS NULL AND ATTENTION = '株式' AND CATEGORY = 'リスク説明未1'

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_2#Sql009 */ T_IPO_PO_SECTION_REF.SECTION_ID, T_IPO_PO_SECTION_REF.SECTION_NAME AS BRANCH_NAME FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO LEFT OUTER JOIN MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO ON MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO.BROKER_CODE = MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO.BROKER_CODE AND MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD = MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN T_IPO_PO_SECTION_REF ON MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO.BROKER_CODE = T_IPO_PO_SECTION_REF.BROKER_CODE AND MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE = T_IPO_PO_SECTION_REF.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE WHERE MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_2#Sql010_1 */ INTO T_IPO_PO_ORDER ( PRODUCT_CODE, PRESENTATION_FROM, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, BROKER_CODE, INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD, DEALER_NUMBER, LOTTERY_RESULT, QUANTITY_ALLOC, ORDER_PRICE, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER, SYS_ID ) VALUES( #{req.brandCode}, #{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}, #{req.butenCode}, #{req.accountNumber}, #{req.brokerCode}, #{req.brokerChargeCode}, #{req.dealerNumber}, #{req.lotteryResult}, #{req.bbQuantityAlloc}, #{req.issueBbPrice}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId}, 'SUB0204_02-04_2' )

INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_2#Sql010_2 */ INTO T_IPO_PO_ORDER_DETAIL ( PRODUCT_CODE, PRESENTATION_FROM, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, DETAIL_NUMBER, ORDER_STATUS, ORDER_USER, ORDER_TIME, ORDER_COUNT, APPOINT_PRICE, DEPOSIT_TYPE, INVITATION_TYPE, ORDER_METHOD, PROSPECTUS, EXPLANATION_INFO, WARNING_APPLY, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER, SYS_ID ) VALUES( #{req.brandCode}, #{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}, #{req.butenCode}, #{req.accountNumber}, '001', '1', #{req.orderUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.quantity}, #{req.contractAmount}, #{req.depositType}, #{req.kanyuKbn}, #{req.jutyuKbn}, #{req.mokuromiKoufuKbn}, #{req.importantMatterType},
#{req.invitationCheck},
'2',
'0',
IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId}, 'SUB0204_02-04_2' )
